text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the autumn Tenno Sho draws closer, Silence
Suzuka questions Matikanefukukitaru about
whether she is happy or not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru answers that, thanks to her
fans and I, she's very happy being able to run her
heart out now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, she asks Silence Suzuka the exact
same question.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka answers that while she isn't quite
happy yet, she has the feeling it's almost within
reach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, Matikanefukukitaru and Silence Suzuka
move forward, each seeking their own form of
happiness.
